name: Swordfish Bolognese
recipeInstructions:
Approx. Cook Time: 0:25
1. Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
2. Add chopped onion and celery; sauté until vegetables are tender.
3. Stir in garlic, capers, cloves, bay leaf, and parsley root. Continue cooking for 5-7 minutes.
4. Add swordfish pieces to the pan and cook for an additional 10-15 minutes, stirring gently.
5. Pour in wine and stir until it reduces by half.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Serve over a bed of buttered noodles.
